regressions.detail: Watcher SKIPping every 5-min cycle for 35+ min on .claude/worktrees/dashboard-banners/ (sibling-agent EnterWorktree leftover). Founder decisions dropped to ~/Downloads/ would NOT be applied. Verify canary TEST-PIPELINE-CANARY.md also self-blocks. Both addressable by widening $routinePatterns in scripts/cron/downloads-watcher.ps1.

known_failures.detail: main-flows.html modified 13.9 min after most recent user-context capture

cycle_notes: AMD-023 verify-approval-pipeline.sh executed end-to-end (full mode, 6-min window). Detected real production-affecting outage of the approval pipeline: watcher has been silently SKIPping every cycle since 23:40:49Z due to sibling-agent .claude/worktrees/dashboard-banners/ falling outside the watcher's $routinePatterns allowlist. CRITICAL task queued to main agent. Pipeline status stays red until allowlist widened + dirty dir cleared or routinely accepted.
